sections.paragraph:
ἀνίλεως, gen. ω merciless (Herodian [?], Epim. [=Partitiones] 257 JBoissonade; TestGad 5:11; TestAbr A 12 p. 91, 7 [Stone p. 30] al.; ApcEsdr 4:9 p. 28, 9 Tdf. [κρίσις]) κρίσις Js 2:13 v.l. (for ἀνέλεος, q.v.).—DELG s.v. ἱλάσκομαι.

gen. gen. = genitive

Herodian Herodian = Herodianus Historicus, III a.d.—List 5

TestGad TestGad = Testament of Gad, s. Test12Patr—List 2

TestAbr TestAbr = Testament of Abraham, with some interpolations; I b.c./I a.d.—Lists 2, 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

ApcEsdr ApcEsdr = Apocalypse of Esdras—List 2

Tdf. Tdf. = CvTischendorf—List 1, beg.

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 83
